section.title: NAME
section.p: connect - Connect the database to the current node.

section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Connect the database to the current node. Use SSL connection if secure is true, default false. After connecting them, users can execute a set of operations. Users can check relative manipulations with the method "node.connect().help()".

plentry.pd: 是否使用安全的 SSL 连接，可选参数，在 secure 为 true 时生效，默认为 false。

section.title: Examples
section.p: Connect the database to the current node.
